name: soc2_asset_risk_features_v1
description: SOC2-oriented asset risk features (impact, likelihood, risk) derived from dev_assets + control evidence features. Non-aggregate gold metrics should be computed separately.

soc2_impact_components.name: soc2_impact_components
soc2_impact_components.description: Impact drivers for SOC2: asset criticality, environment, privileged access nodes, and internet exposure proxies.

features.name: soc2_impact_env_weight
features.description: Impact weight derived from soc2_asset_environment (prod highest, dev lowest).
features.purpose: Raises impact for production systems due to higher operational and customer trust consequences.

features.name: soc2_impact_bastion_multiplier
features.description: Multiplier applied when soc2_is_bastion_device is true true; bastion access nodes amplify business impact of compromise.
features.purpose: Captures elevated impact of privileged access compromise.

features.name: soc2_impact_internet_exposure_weight
features.description: Impact weight derived from is_internet_exposed_proxy and device_zone; exposed assets generally have higher blast radius.
features.purpose: Increases impact for externally exposed assets where incidents have broader scope.

features.name: soc2_raw_impact
features.description: Composite impact score for SOC2 derived from environment, bastion status, and exposure proxies.
features.purpose: Impact component for SOC2 risk equation (Risk = Impact × Likelihood).

soc2_likelihood_components.name: soc2_likelihood_components
soc2_likelihood_components.description: Likelihood drivers for SOC2: monitoring gaps, missing endpoint controls, misconfigurations, and exploitable vulns.

features.name: soc2_likelihood_monitoring_gap
features.description: Likelihood contribution based on has_agent_installed, agent_last_checkin_ts recency, and agent_health_state.
features.purpose: Captures increased probability of undetected compromise when telemetry is missing or stale.

features.name: soc2_likelihood_endpoint_control_gap
features.description: Likelihood contribution when EDR/AV are missing or weak (has_edr_installed, antivirus_present).
features.purpose: Models increased compromise probability when baseline endpoint protections are absent.

features.name: soc2_likelihood_misconfig
features.description: Likelihood contribution derived from SMB legacy enablement, PowerShell policy risk, and secure boot state.
features.purpose: Captures compromise probability from common misconfiguration/hardening gaps.

features.name: soc2_likelihood_exploitable_vuln
features.description: Likelihood contribution from has_kev_vuln_open, exploitable_vuln_present, and highest_cvss_open.
features.purpose: Escalates likelihood sharply when active exploitation evidence exists.

features.name: soc2_raw_likelihood
features.description: Composite SOC2 likelihood score derived from monitoring gap, endpoint controls gap, misconfiguration, and exploitable vulnerability signals.
features.purpose: Likelihood component for SOC2 risk equation (Risk = Impact × Likelihood).

soc2_risk_metrics.name: soc2_risk_metrics
soc2_risk_metrics.description: SOC2 risk computed from impact and likelihood with explicit explainability hooks.

features.name: soc2_raw_risk
features.description: SOC2 risk score computed from soc2_raw_impact × soc2_raw_likelihood (or calibrated equivalent).
features.purpose: Primary SOC2 decision score for asset-level prioritization (silver).

features.name: soc2_risk_driver_primary
features.description: Most influential driver among monitoring_gap / endpoint_control_gap / misconfig / exploitable_vuln for this asset.
features.purpose: Explainability feature used for triage routing and evidence narratives.
